451.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Verily, before the Hour there will be liars, so beware of them.'
451.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya sebelum Kiamat akan ada para pendusta, maka berhati-hatilah terhadap mereka.'

452.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that Ma'iz ibn Malik came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and confessed to fornication. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ turned away from him, then he came again and confessed again, until he confessed four times. Then the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Take him away and stone him.'
452.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Ma'iz ibn Malik datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan mengaku melakukan zina. Rasulullah ﷺ berpaling darinya, lalu ia datang lagi dan mengaku lagi, hingga mengaku empat kali. Kemudian Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Bawalah dia dan rajamlah.'

453.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that Bilal used to call the adhan for the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ came out, Bilal would call the iqama. He would not call the iqama until he saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ emerge.
453.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Bilal biasa mengumandangkan adzan untuk Rasulullah ﷺ. Apabila Rasulullah ﷺ keluar, Bilal mengumandangkan iqama. Ia tidak mengumandangkan iqama hingga melihat Rasulullah ﷺ keluar.

454.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that when someone greeted the Messenger of Allah ﷺ during prayer, he would respond with a gesture of his hand. When Jabir returned from the Negus, he greeted the Prophet ﷺ while he was praying, and he gestured with his hand in response.
454.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa apabila seseorang mengucapkan salam kepada Rasulullah ﷺ saat beliau sedang shalat, beliau menjawab dengan isyarat tangannya. Ketika Jabir kembali dari Najasyi, ia mengucapkan salam kepada Nabi ﷺ yang sedang shalat, dan beliau memberi isyarat tangan sebagai balasan.

455.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'This matter will not end until twelve caliphs have come over them.' He then said a word that I did not hear, so I asked my father: 'What did he say?' He said: 'He said: all of them from Quraysh.'
455.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Urusan ini tidak akan berakhir hingga dua belas khalifah telah memegang kekuasaan atas mereka.' Kemudian beliau mengucapkan sesuatu yang tidak aku dengar, lalu aku bertanya kepada ayahku: 'Apa yang beliau katakan?' Ia berkata: 'Beliau bersabda: semuanya dari Quraisy.'

456.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the household of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and those with him at al-Harra ate a she-camel that had died. He said: 'We slaughtered it, then found it to be in such a state, so we ate it.'
456.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa keluarga Rasulullah ﷺ dan orang-orang yang bersamanya di al-Harra memakan seekor unta betina yang telah mati. Ia berkata: 'Kami menyembelihnya, lalu mendapatinya dalam keadaan demikian, maka kami memakannya.'

457.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man who killed himself was brought to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ did not pray over him.
457.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki yang membunuh dirinya sendiri dibawa kepada Rasulullah ﷺ. Rasulullah ﷺ tidak menyalatinya.

458.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to deliver the sermon on Fridays while standing. He would then sit, then stand again. Whoever tells you that he delivered it while sitting has lied.
458.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa berkhutbah pada hari Jumat sambil berdiri. Kemudian beliau duduk, lalu berdiri lagi. Barangsiapa memberitahumu bahwa beliau berkhutbah sambil duduk, maka ia telah berdusta.

459.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ had sparse white hairs. When he applied oil his hair, they were not visible; when he did not apply oil, they could be seen.
459.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memiliki beberapa helai uban yang jarang. Apabila beliau memakai minyak rambutnya, uban-uban itu tidak terlihat; apabila beliau tidak memakai minyak, uban-uban itu bisa terlihat.

460.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to lead the Dhuhr and Asr prayers without reciting anything. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to recite in the Fajr prayer, and we could hear him reciting sometimes.
460.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa memimpin shalat Dhuhur dan Ashar tanpa mengeraskan bacaan. Rasulullah ﷺ biasa membaca dalam shalat Subuh, dan kami bisa mendengar bacaan beliau kadang-kadang.

461.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Laylat al-Qadr is in the last ten nights of Ramadan. Seek it in the odd nights thereof.'
461.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Lailatul Qadar berada pada sepuluh malam terakhir Ramadan. Carilah ia pada malam-malam ganjilnya.'

462.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Perform wudu after eating camel meat.' Someone asked: 'And after eating sheep meat?' He said: 'If you wish.'
462.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Berwudhulah setelah memakan daging unta.' Seseorang bertanya: 'Dan setelah memakan daging domba?' Beliau bersabda: 'Terserahmu.'

463.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he described the Messenger of Allah ﷺ: his eyes had a redness in them, his heels were lean, and his mouth was wide.
463.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia menggambarkan Rasulullah ﷺ: mata beliau memiliki sedikit warna merah, tumitnya ramping, dan mulutnya lebar.

464.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to deliver two sermons while standing, sitting in between them. He would recite from the Quran and remind the people. His sermons were not very long.
464.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa menyampaikan dua khutbah sambil berdiri, dengan duduk di antara keduanya. Beliau membaca dari Al-Qur'an dan mengingatkan manusia. Khutbah-khutbah beliau tidak terlalu panjang.

465.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'This religion will remain dominant until twelve caliphs have led you.' Then he said a word I did not hear. I asked my father what he said, and he replied: 'He said: all of them from Quraysh.'
465.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Agama ini akan tetap kuat hingga dua belas khalifah memimpin kalian.' Kemudian beliau mengucapkan sesuatu yang tidak aku dengar. Aku bertanya kepada ayahku apa yang beliau katakan, dan ia menjawab: 'Beliau bersabda: semuanya dari Quraisy.'

466.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, after praying Fajr, would remain sitting in his prayer place until the sun had fully risen. Then he would stand.
466.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ, setelah shalat Subuh, tetap duduk di tempat shalatnya hingga matahari terbit sepenuhnya. Kemudian beliau berdiri.

467.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When the family of Kisra perishes, there will be no family of Kisra after them. When Caesar perishes, there will be no Caesar after him. By Him in Whose Hand is my soul, you will spend their treasures in the way of Allah.'
467.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila keluarga Kisra binasa, tidak akan ada keluarga Kisra setelah mereka. Apabila Kaisar binasa, tidak akan ada Kaisar setelah mereka. Demi Dzat yang jiwaku berada di tangan-Nya, kalian akan membelanjakan harta-harta mereka di jalan Allah.'

468.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Allah named Medina Tayyiba.'
468.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Allah menamakan Madinah Tayyiba.'

469.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Before the Hour there will be afflictions like portions of a dark night, and lying speech. Beware of them and their people.'
469.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sebelum Kiamat akan ada bencana-bencana seperti potongan malam yang gelap, dan ucapan dusta. Berhati-hatilah terhadap mereka dan orang-orang mereka.'

470.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave permission to eat a dead mule — or he said: a dead she-camel — in a time of necessity.
470.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memberikan izin untuk memakan bangkai keledai — atau beliau berkata: bangkai unta betina — dalam keadaan darurat.

471.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man asked him whether he must perform wudu after sleeping. He said: 'Yes, if sleep overcomes you, then you must perform wudu, for the Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded us with that.'
471.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki bertanya kepadanya apakah ia harus berwudhu setelah tidur. Ia berkata: 'Ya, jika tidur menguasaimu, maka kamu harus berwudhu, karena Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkan kami dengan hal itu.'

472.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to lead the obligatory prayers in a moderate manner — neither too long nor too short. His Friday sermon was also moderate, neither too long nor too short.
472.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa memimpin shalat-shalat wajib secara sedang — tidak terlalu panjang dan tidak terlalu pendek. Khutbah Jumatnya juga sedang, tidak terlalu panjang dan tidak terlalu pendek.

473.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ always delivered the sermon while standing. Whoever claims he delivered it while sitting has lied. I used to pray with him, and his prayer was of moderate length.
473.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ selalu menyampaikan khutbah sambil berdiri. Barangsiapa mengklaim beliau menyampaikannya sambil duduk, maka ia telah berdusta. Aku biasa shalat bersamanya, dan shalatnya memiliki panjang yang sedang.

474.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I recognize a stone in Mecca that used to greet me before I received revelation. I still recognize it now.'
474.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku mengenali sebuah batu di Makkah yang biasa mengucapkan salam kepadaku sebelum aku menerima wahyu. Aku masih mengenalinya sekarang.'

475.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to delay the Isha prayer until the last third of the night. He said: 'You are making it difficult for the elderly, the weak, and those with needs — so pray Isha when you hear the adhan.'
475.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa menunda shalat Isya hingga sepertiga malam terakhir. Beliau bersabda: 'Kalian menyulitkan orang tua, orang lemah, dan orang yang memiliki keperluan — maka shalatlah Isya ketika kalian mendengar adzan.'

476.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he wrote to the son of Sa'd informing him of the character and conduct of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and how he used to pray.
476.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia menulis kepada putra Sa'd memberitahukan kepadanya tentang akhlak dan perilaku Rasulullah ﷺ dan bagaimana beliau biasa shalat.

477.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he described the Messenger of Allah ﷺ: he was neither too tall nor too short, and he was somewhat stout. His hair was neither curly nor straight. His face was not round — it was slightly elongated.
477.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia menggambarkan Rasulullah ﷺ: beliau tidak terlalu tinggi dan tidak terlalu pendek, agak gempal. Rambutnya tidak keriting dan tidak lurus. Wajahnya tidak bulat — sedikit lonjong.

478.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ mentioned the Dajjal while they were on a journey. He said: 'What I fear for you regarding the Dajjal is not what you are preoccupied with. If he comes while I am among you, I will deal with him. And if he comes after me, then each person must defend himself.'
478.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ menyebut Dajjal saat mereka sedang dalam perjalanan. Beliau bersabda: 'Yang aku khawatirkan mengenai kalian tentang Dajjal bukanlah apa yang kalian sibukkan. Jika dia datang sementara aku masih di antara kalian, aku akan menghadapinya. Dan jika dia datang setelah aku pergi, maka setiap orang harus membela dirinya sendiri.'

479.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ delivered the sermon while standing, then sat down without speaking, then stood again and delivered a second sermon. Whoever tells you he delivered it while sitting has lied.
479.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ menyampaikan khutbah sambil berdiri, kemudian duduk tanpa berbicara, lalu berdiri lagi dan menyampaikan khutbah kedua. Barangsiapa memberitahumu bahwa beliau menyampaikannya sambil duduk, maka ia telah berdusta.

480.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prayed over Ibn al-Dahdah. Then he was brought a short-legged horse and he mounted it, and it set off with him while it was fiery and spirited.
480.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ menyalatkan Ibn al-Dahdah. Kemudian dibawakan kepadanya seekor kuda berbadan pendek dan beliau menungganginya, dan kuda itu bergerak bersamanya dengan penuh semangat dan bergairah.

481.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he saw the Seal of Prophethood on the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. It was like a pigeon's egg, resembling the area between his shoulders.
481.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia melihat Cincin Kenabian pada Rasulullah ﷺ. Ia seperti telur merpati, menyerupai area di antara kedua pundak beliau.

482.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'There will be twelve commanders.' He then said a word that I did not hear clearly. I asked my father and he said: 'He said: all of them from Quraysh.' I heard this at the Farewell Pilgrimage.
482.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Akan ada dua belas komandan.' Kemudian beliau mengucapkan sesuatu yang tidak aku dengar dengan jelas. Aku bertanya kepada ayahku dan ia berkata: 'Beliau bersabda: semuanya dari Quraisy.' Aku mendengar ini pada Haji Wada'.

483.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Is not the one who raises his head before the imam afraid that Allah will transform his head into the head of a donkey, or make his form that of a donkey?'
483.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apakah orang yang mengangkat kepalanya sebelum imam tidak takut bahwa Allah akan mengubah kepalanya menjadi kepala keledai, atau menjadikan bentuknya seperti bentuk keledai?'

484.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Islam will remain honourable as long as twelve men from Quraysh are in authority.' He then said a word that I could not make out, and my father told me he said: 'all from Quraysh.'
484.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Islam akan tetap mulia selama dua belas orang dari Quraisy memegang kekuasaan.' Kemudian beliau mengucapkan sesuatu yang tidak bisa aku pahami, dan ayahku memberitahuku bahwa beliau bersabda: 'semuanya dari Quraisy.'

485.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Before the Hour there will come liars, so beware of them.' I asked: 'O Messenger of Allah, will you describe them to us?' He said: 'Yes — they claim to bring what no messenger ever brought.'
485.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sebelum Kiamat akan datang para pendusta, maka berhati-hatilah terhadap mereka.' Aku bertanya: 'Ya Rasulullah, apakah kamu akan menggambarkan mereka kepada kami?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya — mereka mengklaim membawa apa yang tidak pernah dibawa oleh seorang rasul pun.'

486.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was asked about the grey hairs of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He said: 'He had some grey hairs in the parting of his hair. When he applied oil, they could not be seen.'
486.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia ditanya tentang uban Rasulullah ﷺ. Ia berkata: 'Beliau memiliki beberapa uban di belahan rambutnya. Apabila beliau memakai minyak, uban-uban itu tidak bisa terlihat.'

487.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said at the Farewell Pilgrimage: 'This matter will not end until twelve commanders are over you, all of them from Quraysh.' He then whispered something that I did not catch, so my father told me what he said.
487.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda pada Haji Wada': 'Urusan ini tidak akan berakhir hingga dua belas komandan memimpin kalian, semuanya dari Quraisy.' Kemudian beliau berbisik sesuatu yang tidak aku tangkap, maka ayahku memberitahuku apa yang beliau katakan.

488.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to deliver the sermon on the minbar while standing, then he would sit, then stand again to deliver the second sermon. Whoever claims he delivered it while sitting has lied.
488.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa menyampaikan khutbah di atas mimbar sambil berdiri, kemudian duduk, lalu berdiri lagi untuk menyampaikan khutbah kedua. Barangsiapa mengklaim beliau menyampaikannya sambil duduk, maka ia telah berdusta.

489.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ did not make the prayer burdensome upon the people. After praying Fajr, he would sit in his place until the sun had fully risen, and only then would he rise.
489.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ tidak membebani orang-orang dengan shalat. Setelah shalat Subuh, beliau duduk di tempatnya hingga matahari terbit sepenuhnya, dan baru kemudian beliau bangkit.

490.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, after praying Fajr, would not leave his prayer place until the sun rose. The companions would converse, recall their pre-Islamic affairs, and laugh, while the Prophet ﷺ would smile with them.
490.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ, setelah shalat Subuh, tidak meninggalkan tempat shalatnya hingga matahari terbit. Para sahabat akan berbincang-bincang, mengingat urusan-urusan mereka di masa jahiliyah, dan tertawa, sementara Nabi ﷺ tersenyum bersama mereka.

491.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, after praying Fajr, would sit in his prayer place until the sun rose, and he would recite long surahs and their subsections during the prayer.
491.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ, setelah shalat Subuh, duduk di tempat shalatnya hingga matahari terbit, dan beliau membaca surah-surah panjang beserta bagian-bagiannya dalam shalat.

492.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to deliver the Friday sermon while standing. Whoever tells you that he delivered it sitting has lied. His prayers were not like the prayers of people today — they were shorter.
492.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa menyampaikan khutbah Jumat sambil berdiri. Barangsiapa memberitahumu bahwa beliau menyampaikannya sambil duduk, maka ia telah berdusta. Shalat-shalatnya tidak seperti shalat orang-orang hari ini — lebih pendek.

493.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prayed the two Eid prayers more than once without an adhan or iqama.
493.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ menunaikan shalat dua hari raya lebih dari sekali tanpa adzan maupun iqama.

494.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man who had killed himself with a spear was brought to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He said: 'I will not pray over him.'
494.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki yang telah membunuh dirinya sendiri dengan tombak dibawa kepada Rasulullah ﷺ. Beliau bersabda: 'Aku tidak akan menyalatinya.'

495.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that Bilal used to call the adhan when the sun had passed its zenith. He would then wait, and when the Messenger of Allah ﷺ came out, Bilal would call the iqama.
495.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Bilal biasa mengumandangkan adzan ketika matahari telah melewati puncaknya. Kemudian ia menunggu, dan ketika Rasulullah ﷺ keluar, Bilal mengumandangkan iqama.

496.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that Bilal would call the adhan, then would not call the iqama until he saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ emerge. When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ came out, Bilal would immediately call the iqama.
496.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Bilal mengumandangkan adzan, kemudian tidak mengumandangkan iqama hingga ia melihat Rasulullah ﷺ keluar. Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ keluar, Bilal segera mengumandangkan iqama.

497.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to deliver the sermon on the minbar in a standing position, then he would sit between the two sermons, then stand again for the second sermon.
497.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa menyampaikan khutbah di atas mimbar dalam posisi berdiri, kemudian duduk di antara dua khutbah, lalu berdiri lagi untuk khutbah kedua.

498.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that Bilal called the adhan when the sun declined, then waited. When he saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ come out, he immediately called the iqama.
498.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Bilal mengumandangkan adzan ketika matahari condong, kemudian menunggu. Ketika ia melihat Rasulullah ﷺ keluar, ia segera mengumandangkan iqama.

499.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he had witnessed the Messenger of Allah ﷺ in the mosque more than a hundred times. The companions would discuss poetry and matters of their pre-Islamic days, and the Prophet ﷺ would remain silent and occasionally smile along with them.
499.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia pernah menyaksikan Rasulullah ﷺ di masjid lebih dari seratus kali. Para sahabat akan mendiskusikan syair dan urusan-urusan masa jahiliyah mereka, dan Nabi ﷺ tetap diam dan sesekali tersenyum bersama mereka.

500.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that Ma'iz ibn Malik came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He said: 'I have committed fornication.' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ turned away from him. He came again and repeated his confession. He did this four times, and then the Messenger of Allah ﷺ ordered that he be stoned, and he was stoned.
500.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Ma'iz ibn Malik datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ. Ia berkata: 'Aku telah berzina.' Rasulullah ﷺ berpaling darinya. Ia datang lagi dan mengulangi pengakuannya. Ia melakukan ini empat kali, kemudian Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkan agar dia dirajam, dan dia pun dirajam.
